label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library seeder — fixed the "Unterminated string in JSON at position 25xxx" failures. Gemini was hitting its 8k output token cap mid-batch and returning truncated JSON the parser couldn't handle. Bumped the budget to 32k and reduced batch size from 25 to 20 so we sit comfortably under the cap.

Plant Library seeder — even when a response IS truncated (e.g. unusually chunky batch), we now salvage every complete plant object before the cut-off instead of losing the entire batch. The remaining slots count toward the run's failed tally so the totals stay honest.
